---
name: Feature request / idea
about: Suggest a change or new capability
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What

One paragraph. The change in concrete terms.

## Why

Who benefits and how. Tie to the project's audience (NIH program officers preparing for Council of Councils) when possible — that's the lens scope decisions go through.

## Acceptance

How we'd know it's done. Bullet points are fine.

## Out of scope

What this issue is *not*. Useful for keeping the conversation tight.

## Related

Linked issues, related ADRs in `docs/decisions/`, or BLUEPRINT sections this touches.
